name: Channel the Gale
description: When you use Elemental Channeling, you may instead cast Gust of Wind or Silence without expending a spell slot or requiring concentration. Gust of Wind lasts 1 minute and can be re-aimed as a bonus action; Silence is a 20-foot-radius sphere you can slide up to 10 feet as a bonus action. Slipstream: you and allies within 10 feet ignore wind-based difficult terrain, and you have advantage on checks to escape a grapple.
